outreach.diagnosis: Haeduri Chicken City appears to have no meaningful website presence, which means search and referral traffic has nowhere strong to land. A simple, credible restaurant site would likely improve trust and enquiry conversion.
outreach.coldMessageAngle: Noticed there is no dedicated website experience for your restaurant in Brisbane City, so I mocked up what a clearer first impression could look like.
